mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_price (item_id, price1, price2, price3) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{price1}, #{price2}, #{price3})
INSERT INTO item_stock (item_id, item_name, current_cnt, last_updated) VALUES(#{id}, #{itemName}, 0, now())
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.item_name, i.current_cnt, p.price1, p.price2, p.price3, p.create_at FROM items i LEFT JOIN (select p2.* From (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at DESC) AS rn FROM item_price) p2 where p2.rn = 1) p ON p.item_id = i.id WHERE i.item_name like CONCAT('%',#{itemName},'%') AND i.use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT customer FROM item_history WHERE customer like CONCAT('%',#{customer},'%') GROUP BY customer
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_history ( customer, customer_tel,date , item_idx, item_name, cnt, type, created_at, cust_num, address) VALUES
( #{customer}, #{customerTel}, #{date}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.cnt}, #{type}, now(), #{custNum}, #{address} )
mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.date, i.item_name, h.cnt, h.customer, h.customer_tel, h.type, p.price1, p.price2, p.price3, h.created_at, h.cust_num, h.address FROM item_history h left join items i on h.item_idx = i.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_id,price1,price2,price3, CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at) = 1 THEN '0000-01-01' ELSE create_at END AS start_date, LEAD(create_at) OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at) AS end_date FROM item_price ) p ON i.id = p.item_id WHERE 1=1
AND h.date >= p.start_date AND (h.date < p.end_date or p.end_date is null)
AND h.date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND h.item_name like concat('%',#{itemName},'%')
AND h.customer like concat('%',#{customer},'%')
AND h.type = #{type}
ORDER BY date desc

SELECT i.id, i.item_name, i.current_cnt, p.price1, p.price2, p.price3, p.create_at FROM items i LEFT JOIN (select p2.* From (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY item_id ORDER BY create_at DESC) AS rn FROM item_price) p2 where p2.rn = 1) p ON p.item_id = i.id WHERE 1=1
AND i.created_at between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
AND i.item_name like CONCAT('%',#{itemName},'%')
AND i.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY i.item_name
SELECT id, item_id, price1, price2, price3, create_at FROM item_price WHERE item_id = #{id} ORDER BY create_at desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_price ( id,item_id, price1,price2,price3, create_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id},#{item.itemId}, #{item.price1},#{item.price2},#{item.price3}, #{item.createAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price1 = VALUES(price1), price2 = VALUES(price2), price3 = VALUES(price3), create_at = VALUES(create_at)
